sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: OceanPal (OP) files Articles of Amendment to implement reverse stock split
feed.summary: OceanPal Inc. has filed Articles of Amendment with the Registrar of Corporations of the Republic of the Marshall Islands on March 27, 2026, to formally implement its recent reverse stock split. This action is reported via a Form 6-K filing, and the information is incorporated by reference into the company's existing Form F-3 registration statements. The filing ensures that OceanPal's offering documents reflect its updated capital structure following the reverse split.

feed.title: Short Interest in Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE:SRFM) Expands By 24.8%
feed.summary: Short interest in Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE:SRFM) increased significantly by 24.8% in March, reaching over 10.5 million shares, which represents about 14.9% of the stock. Despite this, analysts have a mixed view, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $3.13, following some recent downward revisions. The stock is currently trading at $1.06, below its 50- and 200-day moving averages.

feed.title: Synergy CHC pushes earnings release and investor call to April 1
feed.summary: Synergy CHC Corp. (NASDAQ: SNYR) has announced a revised date for its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results, moving the release to Wednesday, April 1, 2026, before market open. A conference call with CEO Jack Ross and CFO Jaime Fickett will follow at 9:00 a.m. ET. The company will discuss its financial performance and provide updates to investors during the call.

feed.title: SNDL Appoints Interim Cannabis President as Tyler Robson Departs
feed.summary: SNDL Inc. has announced the departure of its President of Cannabis, Tyler Robson, who is leaving to pursue other opportunities. Chief Strategy Officer Ryan Hellard will assume the role of Interim President of Cannabis to ensure continuity in the company's core cannabis operations and strategy. The company is balancing its roles as a major cannabis producer and retailer in Canada, and investors will be watching for potential shifts in corporate direction.

feed.title: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ:SNDL) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: SNDL Inc. (NASDAQ:SNDL) experienced a significant 25.6% increase in short interest in March, reaching 2,152,216 shares. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating and a $5.00 price target from analysts, the company's financial performance shows a mix of beating EPS estimates but missing revenue expectations, and it has a negative forecast for the current fiscal year's EPS. Institutional investors have been both buying and selling shares, while the stock currently trades around $1.29 with a market cap of $330.76 million.

feed.title: SmartRent (SMRT) HR chief details stock options and RSU holdings
feed.summary: SmartRent, Inc.'s Chief Human Resources Officer, Heather Auer, filed an initial Form 3 revealing her equity holdings, which include employee stock options and restricted stock units (RSUs). The filing details various option grants with different exercise prices and expiration dates, as well as RSU grants with specific vesting schedules. This report provides a transparent overview of her compensation-linked ownership in the company.

feed.title: Silexion Therapeutics (SLXN) CSO logs sale-to-cover share transaction
feed.summary: Shirvan Mitchell, CSO and CDO of Silexion Therapeutics (SLXN), reported selling 22,818 Ordinary Shares on March 26, 2026, at $1.36 per share. This transaction was a "sale-to-cover" to address tax liabilities from a fully vested restricted share unit grant received in February 2026. Following the sale, Mitchell directly holds 27,889 Ordinary Shares and an adjusted stock option for 478 Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Siebert Reports 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Siebert Financial Corp. announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, reporting a 12% increase in revenue to $94.2 million due to growth in stock borrow/loan revenue and new business lines like NIL negotiation services. Despite an increase in revenue, operating income decreased to $5.6 million primarily due to strategic investments in technology initiatives and new business development. The company remains focused on scaling these initiatives and converting investments into stronger long-term earnings and shareholder value.

feed.title: Siebert Reports 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Siebert Financial Corp. announced its financial results for the year ended December 31, 2025, reporting a 12% revenue increase to $94.2 million, driven significantly by a 51% rise in stock borrow/loan revenue. The company's operating income decreased to $5.6 million due to strategic investments in new business lines and technology, but retail customer net worth grew by 9% to $19.5 billion. CEO John J. Gebbia highlighted 2025 as a year of growth and investment, positioning Siebert for long-term expansion and diverse revenue opportunities in 2026.

feed.title: Short Interest in SLR Investment Corp. (NASDAQ:SLRC) Expands By 23.8%
feed.summary: SLR Investment Corp. (NASDAQ:SLRC) experienced a 23.8% increase in short interest during March, reaching 609,038 shares, which represents about 1.2% of its shares outstanding. Despite this, the company maintains a high dividend yield of 11.7% with a $0.41 quarterly dividend. Analyst ratings are mixed, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating, while an insider recently increased their stake by purchasing 25,000 shares.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Issues Pessimistic Forecast for SLR Investment (NASDAQ:SLRC) Stock Price
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods recently lowered its price target for SLR Investment (NASDAQ:SLRC) from $16.50 to $15.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, while other analysts have mixed views resulting in an average "Hold" rating and a target of $15.29. The stock is currently trading below its 50 and 200-day moving averages, and an insider recently purchased 25,000 shares, increasing insider ownership to 8.80%. Institutional investors hold approximately 35.32% of the company.

feed.title: Sky Quarry Received Notice of Delisting
feed.summary: Sky Quarry received a notice of delisting from Nasdaq on March 24, 2026, due to noncompliance with the minimum $1.00 bid rule. However, on March 30, 2026, Nasdaq informed the company that it had regained compliance after a reverse stock split and 10 consecutive days above the minimum bid requirement, thereby closing the delisting matter.

feed.title: Sun Life Fully Acquires BGO and Crescent to Bolster Alternatives Platform
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial has completed the acquisition of the remaining equity stakes in BGO, its global real estate investment manager, and Crescent Capital Group, its global alternative credit investment manager. This consolidation aims to strengthen SLC Management's alternatives growth strategy, enhance market position, and support medium-term growth targets for third-party AUM and fee-related earnings. Although the transactions will result in a one-time charge in Q1 2026 and a modest reduction in equity, Sun Life views these acquisitions as a strategic step forward, complemented by a new Management Equity Plan to align leadership with future performance.

feed.title: SLM Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of recent news and events related to SLM (Sallie Mae) stock. Key topics include updates on the Student Loan SAVE Plan, Sallie Mae's earnings performance, government actions regarding student loans, new financing options for graduates, and scholarship announcements. It also mentions a significant share repurchase agreement and ongoing legal issues.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Maintains 'Overweight' Rating on Fifth Third Bancorp
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reaffirmed its 'overweight' rating on Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) but lowered its price target from $57.00 to $54.00. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 21.01% from the current trading price, with other firms largely maintaining 'buy' ratings. The firm's report reflects Wall Street's generally positive, yet cautiously optimistic, view of the regional bank's near-term performance.

feed.title: IonQ’s US$1.8b SkyWater Deal Reshapes Quantum Hardware Investment Story
feed.summary: IonQ is acquiring SkyWater Technology for US$1.8 billion, aiming to gain more control over its quantum hardware supply chain and production to advance commercially viable, fault-tolerant quantum computing. This strategic acquisition is intended to improve chip design, manufacturing, and iteration, but it also raises questions about integration complexity, capital needs, and IonQ's existing track record of unprofitability and equity-funded growth. Investors are advised to monitor the deal's funding, cost synergies, and impact on IonQ's hardware roadmap, particularly given expected revenue growth and the potential for stronger positioning in the quantum ecosystem.

feed.title: Oracle Corp Stock: Cloud Dominance and AI Opportunities Drive Long-Term Investor Interest in NYSE:OR
feed.summary: Oracle Corp continues to be a leader in cloud and database solutions, with its Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) positioning it strongly to capitalize on the growing demand for AI workloads. The company's focus on high-margin recurring cloud revenues, strategic AI partnerships, and strong financial health make it an attractive long-term investment, particularly for North American investors seeking exposure to resilient enterprise technology and AI infrastructure. Despite competitive pressures and capital-intensive datacenter expansion, Oracle's innovative strategies and stable financial metrics suggest a robust outlook.

feed.title: Mark Gurman Dismisses Apple Intelligence China Launch As Error, Points To Missing Approval And Unusual Timing
feed.summary: Analyst Mark Gurman reported that Apple Intelligence's brief appearance for users in China was an accidental deployment, not an official launch, due to a lack of regulatory approval. Gurman emphasized that Apple would not launch AI in such a crucial market without an announcement, noting the unusual timing and technical inconsistencies. The delay in China for Apple Intelligence is attributed to strict local regulations requiring partnerships with domestic AI providers and compliance with government rules.

feed.title: Short Interest in Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) Increases By 22.6%
feed.summary: Short interest in Archer Daniels Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) rose significantly by 22.6% in March, reaching 15.77 million shares, which represents about 3.3% of the company's shares. This increase comes as analysts hold a "Reduce" consensus rating for ADM, with an average target price of $58.57, despite some recent target revisions. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.52, but its payout ratio is high at nearly 93.7%.

feed.title: Thanks to RIAs (in large part), Schwab CEO Rick Wurster's pay leaped 49%, but may have soared higher -- much higher -- but company stopped considering Fidelity in its calculations, according to SEC disclosure
feed.summary: Schwab CEO Rick Wurster's compensation increased by 49%, a rise partly attributed to the firm's robust RIA business. However, his pay could have been even higher had Schwab not removed Fidelity from its peer comparison group for compensation calculations, as revealed in an SEC filing. This adjustment in peer benchmarking methodology likely impacted the finalreported compensation figure for the CEO.

feed.title: General Motors Co Stock: Navigating Electric Vehicle Transition and Operational Resilience Amid Mark
feed.summary: General Motors Co (GM) is balancing its traditional internal combustion engine business with aggressive investments in electric vehicles (EVs), positioning itself for long-term growth in the North American auto sector. The company's strategy focuses on the Ultium battery platform for scalable EV production and operational resilience through manufacturing agility, supporting dividends and share buybacks. However, challenges include supply chain issues, EV transition hurdles, and intense competition, making investor monitoring of Q1 2026 earnings and model launches crucial.

feed.title: James Manning Discloses Investment in SharonAI Holdings with 8.95% Stake
feed.summary: James Manning, CEO of SharonAI Holdings Inc. (SHAZ), disclosed an 8.95% beneficial ownership stake in the company's Class A shares via a Schedule 13D filing on March 30, 2026. The filing details holdings through personal awards and affiliated entities, emphasizing significant insider ownership and near-term lock-up limits. Manning stated his intention is for investment purposes and he may acquire more shares, with no current plans to change company control, board, or capital structure beyond the specified lock-up periods.

feed.title: Soluna Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLNH) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLNH) saw a significant increase in short interest during March, rising 22.5% to 14,997,436 shares, representing 18.0% of the stock. Analysts hold mixed views, with one Buy and one Sell rating, leading to an average "Hold" consensus and a $5.00 target price. The company's shares are trading at $0.61 with a market cap of $56.25 million, facing high volatility and negative net margins despite reporting $9.21 million in revenue.

feed.title: Analog Devices Showcases Display R&D As Investors Weigh Broader Growth Story
feed.summary: Analog Devices is set to present its R&D efforts in display technology at the 2026 International Conference on Display Technology, providing investors insight into its positioning in high-value display applications. This presentation is significant as the company's stock, NasdaqGS:ADI, has seen mixed recent performance despite substantial multi-year gains. The event offers an opportunity to understand how display technologies align with Analog Devices' broader growth strategy and competitive standing in markets like industrial equipment, automotive, and consumer devices.

feed.title: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. Hits New 52-Week Low at $13.11
feed.summary: Smith Douglas Homes Corp. has reached a new 52-week low of $13.11, reflecting a 45.12% decrease in its stock value over the past year. The microcap company faces significant financial challenges, including six consecutive quarters of negative results, increased raw material costs, and a 9% drop in profits. Despite a high return on equity, the stock's performance has significantly lagged behind the S&P 500.

feed.title: SolarEdge Technologies (NASDAQ:SEDG) Trading Down 9.2% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: SolarEdge Technologies (NASDAQ:SEDG) saw its share price drop by 9.2% on Monday, with trading volume significantly below average. The company reported a quarterly loss and analysts widely rate the stock as "Reduce" with a consensus target price of $29.09, despite some varied recent analyst target adjustments. Institutional investors have been actively buying and selling shares, with 95.10% of the stock owned by them.

feed.title: Scholastic (SCHL) offers up to $200M to buy shares at $36–$40
feed.summary: Scholastic Corporation has announced an amendment to its tender offer to repurchase up to $200 million of its common stock at a price range of $36.00 to $40.00 per share. The amendment clarifies and tightens certain conditions for the offer, including provisions related to legal actions, war or terrorism events occurring on or after March 20, 2026, and material adverse changes. The company reiterates its discretion to postpone, amend, or terminate the offer under specific circumstances, aligning with Exchange Act Rule 13e-4(f)(5).

feed.title: Smithfield Foods Inc (SFD) Shares Up 3.35% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Smithfield Foods Inc (SFD) shares surged 3.35% on March 30, closing at $26.69. This places the stock just below its 52-week high, with considerable upside from its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts predict an average target price of $30.93, indicating an "Outperform" status based on consensus recommendations.

feed.title: Socket Mobile Secures Convertible Note Financing for Liquidity
feed.summary: Socket Mobile (SCKT) recently secured $500,000 in secured subordinated convertible note financing to enhance its working capital. These three-year notes carry a 10% annual interest rate and are convertible into common stock at $0.90 per share, with insider participation approved by a special board committee. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates SCKT as "Neutral" due to declining revenue and profitability, despite some short-term bullish technical indicators and strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Sigma Lithium (NASDAQ: SGML) files 40-F, 111.4M shares outstanding and IFRS statements
feed.summary: Sigma Lithium Corporation (NASDAQ: SGML) has filed its annual Form 40-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, reporting 111,402,979 common shares outstanding. The filing includes the Annual Information Form, MD&A, and audited consolidated financial statements prepared under IFRS, with mineral disclosures adhering to NI 43-101. The company confirmed an audit committee financial expert and stated no waivers were granted for its code of ethics in 2025.

feed.title: Why is SAP Acquiring Master Data Management Company Reltio?
feed.summary: SAP is acquiring Reltio, a master data management (MDM) software provider, to enhance its Business Data Cloud and improve enterprise AI capabilities. The acquisition aims to make enterprise data AI-ready by unifying, cleansing, and harmonizing data from various sources. This move will provide a reliable foundation for AI applications, offering customers improved data quality and faster time-to-value for business AI initiatives.

feed.title: Short Interest in SAP SE (NYSE:SAP) Rises By 26.2%
feed.summary: Short interest in SAP SE (NYSE:SAP) increased by 26.2% in March, reaching 4,632,979 shares as of March 13th, representing 0.4% of shares outstanding. This rise coincides with the company beating quarterly earnings estimates, though its stock remains below its 12-month high. Analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for SAP.

feed.title: There May Be Reason For Hope In Star Bulk Carriers' (NASDAQ:SBLK) Disappointing Earnings
feed.summary: The article discusses Star Bulk Carriers' recent disappointing earnings, noting a significant revenue miss and a 42% drop in EPS year-over-year. Despite the poor quarterly performance and a 4.6% stock decline, the analysis suggests potential for hope, though specifics are not provided in the snippet.

Despite this dip, the average one-year price target from 11 analysts is $36.76, implying a potential upside of 44.37%, and the consensus brokerage recommendation for SARO is "Outperform."

feed.title: Saia to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 30,
feed.summary: Saia, Inc. (Nasdaq: SAIA) announced that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, April 30th. A conference call hosted by Saia management will follow later that morning at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. A replay of the call will be available until May 30, 2026.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Cuts BRP (TSE:DOO) Price Target to C$124.00
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has adjusted its price target for BRP (TSE:DOO) to C$124.00 from C$131.00, while reaffirming an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential upside of 28.9% from its previous close. Despite this cut, the consensus among analysts is a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of C$115.14, showing varied opinions among firms. BRP recently reported C$2.21 EPS on C$2.46 billion revenue and is trading with a market cap of C$7.03 billion.

feed.title: Accelerated Return Notes® from Royal Bank of Canada (OTC: RBMCF) with 300% Participation, 20.25% Cap
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada is offering 3,530,467 Accelerated Return Notes (ARN®) linked to an international equity index basket, maturing on May 28, 2027. These notes provide a 300% participation rate in positive basket performance, capped at a 20.25% return, but expose investors to 100% principal at risk for basket declines and issuer credit risk. The initial estimated value was $9.67 per unit, lower than the $10.00 public offering price due to embedded fees.

feed.title: Rapid7 (RPD) grants JANA board nominee, caps stake at 19.9% through 2027
feed.summary: Rapid7, Inc. has entered into a Nomination and Support Agreement with JANA Partners Management, LP, agreeing to include JANA's nominee, Kevin Galligan, in its recommended slate for the 2026 annual meeting. In exchange, JANA has agreed to cap its ownership of Rapid7's common stock at 19.9% and to vote its shares in favor of the specified director slate, including Galligan. This agreement is effective until January 8, 2027, or 30 days before the advance notice period for 2027 nominations.

feed.title: Richtech Robotics (RR) adds former auditor letter in amended report
feed.summary: Richtech Robotics Inc. (RR) filed an amended 8-K report to include a letter from its former independent registered accounting firm, Bush & Associates CPA LLC. This amendment clarifies whether the former auditor agrees or disagrees with the company's previous disclosure regarding the auditor change. Richtech Robotics had terminated Bush & Associates and engaged CBIZ CPAs P.C. to audit the 2026 fiscal year and review related quarterly statements.

feed.title: Construction Partners Announces Nasdaq Texas Dual Listing
feed.summary: Construction Partners, Inc. (ROAD) announced a dual listing of its Class A common stock on Nasdaq Texas, set to begin trading on March 30, 2026, while maintaining its primary listing on The Nasdaq Global Select Market. This strategic move aims to enhance market visibility, improve stock liquidity, and attract a broader investor base, particularly given the company's strong shareholder support and positive analyst outlook. The construction firm, with a market capitalization of approximately $6.2 billion, anticipates benefiting from increased exposure and trading volumes, further strengthening its position in public markets amidst rising infrastructure investments in the U.S.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Lowers Regions Financial Stock Price Target
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has lowered its price target for Regions Financial (NYSE: RF) stock from $31 to $28 while maintaining a 'neutral' rating, citing a less optimistic outlook for the bank's future performance. This downgrade signals broader concerns about the bank's profitability and growth in the current economic environment, especially since Regions is a key indicator for the health of the broader banking sector. Investors are now closely watching the upcoming earnings report and further analyst updates for the bank.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord Corp. Experiences Valuation Adjustment Amid Strong Market Performance
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord Corp. has seen a recent valuation adjustment, with its stock currently priced at $183.42. The company has demonstrated strong market performance over the past year, returning 51.85% and outperforming the S&P 500. Its financial metrics, including a P/E ratio of 43 and an EV to EBITDA ratio of 13.97, indicate a competitive position within the industrial manufacturing sector compared to its peers.

feed.title: Cancer device reaches 12 U.S. centers as RenovoRx readies trial finish
feed.summary: RenovoRx reported full-year 2025 revenue of $1.1 million for its RenovoCath device, a significant increase from 2024, with 12 U.S. cancer centers actively utilizing the device and 21 more evaluating it. The company's Phase III TIGeR-PaC trial is on track for enrollment completion by mid-2026, with final data anticipated in 2027. RenovoRx also strengthened its financial position with a $10 million private placement, bringing its cash on hand to approximately $13 million.

feed.title: Papa John's goes after rivals with oven-roasted sandwiches (PZZA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Papa John's (PZZA) is expanding its menu significantly by introducing oven-roasted sandwiches, a move aimed at competing with rivals and diversifying beyond its traditional pizza offerings. This strategic launch signifies a new direction for the brand, as stated by Shivram. The company is actively promoting this new menu item as a key part of its growth strategy.

feed.title: REX American Resources (REX) ups earnings and pours cash into carbon capture
feed.summary: REX American Resources reported a significant increase in net income for fiscal year 2025, reaching $83.0 million, up from $58.2 million in 2024, primarily due to improved crush spreads and 45Z production tax credits. The company is making substantial investments of $220–$230 million in carbon sequestration and capacity expansion at its One Earth Energy plant, aiming to qualify for federal 45Q and extended 45Z tax credits. However, these projects face considerable regulatory and execution risks, including evolving permitting frameworks and legal challenges, which could impact their successful and timely completion.

feed.title: Rio Tinto PLC (RIO) Stock Price Up 3.57% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Shares of Rio Tinto PLC (RIO) rose 3.57% on March 30, closing at $89.73. This places the stock 11.62% below its 52-week high and 73.66% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $93.17, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $70.97, suggesting a potential downside.
